'''Surron StarTech''' was a shipwright company developed by the insectoid [[Surronian (species)|Surronians]] from the world [[Surron]].<ref name="FC" /> Although the Surronians were long-respected shipbuilders, they went into financial difficulties and created Surron StarTech in order to mass produce and distribute their [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. They therefore developed standards lines of their expensive limited models for open sale. However, most of these vessels remained beyond the average price ranges.<ref name="SS" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Surron StarTech was a new player in the field of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] design when it signed on with [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] to produce the [[Starlight-class light freighter|''Starlight''-class light freighter]]. This unexpected collaboration was intended to boost the profits of Surron and Rendili but the joint venture was a failure for both companies.<ref name="P&P" />
